raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XX/XX/year> response investigation is incomplete, contradictory, and failed to meet the requirements of Regulation XXXX  and the Fair Credit Reporting Act ( FCRA ). 

XXXX. Entire Order Ignored : My dispute covered the entire order ( approx. {$1200.00} ). Citibank falsely limited its review to only {$190.00} and {$540.00}, ignoring the rest of the disputed order. Their claim that I defaulted for non-payment The whole order is in dispute and Citibank misrepresents the facts. Under Regulation XXXX, a creditor must investigate the full disputed transaction, not cherry-pick line items. 

XXXX. No Proof of Delivery : Citibank has never provided verifiable proof that I received any of the disputed merchandise. They rely solely on merchant summaries. No GPS record, delivery photo, or my signature has ever been produced. Merchant summaries are not sufficient proof under Regulation XXXX or FCRA. 

XXXX. {$380.00} Reversal Contradiction : Citibank briefly credited {$380.00}, then re-billed it. This inconsistent handling shows their records are unreliable and their investigation inadequate. 

XXXX. No Recourse Admission : In earlier letters, Citibank admitted they had no recourse to recover the funds. Continuing to report this account as a valid charge-off directly contradicts their own written admission. 

XXXX. False Default Claim : Citibank claims I defaulted for non-payment, when in fact I was exercising my right under Regulation XXXX  to withhold payment during a billing dispute. Their reporting of a charge-off is inaccurate and misleading under FCRA XXXX XXXX b ). 

Requested Action : Citibank has not met its legal obligations. I request CFPB escalate this matter for supervisory review and require Citibank to either ( a ) produce verifiable delivery proof tied to me ( GPS, photo, or signature ) or ( b ) delete the tradeline and all related charges from my credit reports.
